title: Former NASA astronaut Jeanette Epps visits ESTEC
Thales Alenia Space Selects US Provider to Develop Lunar Habitat Wheels
summary:
Thales Alenia Space has awarded a contract to US-based Astrobotic to develop the wheels for the Multi-Purpose Habitation module, a mobile lunar habitat under development for the Italian Space Agency (ASI). In 2020, ASI and NASA signed a joint statement of intent to cooperate on the development of a lunar habitat that could support crewed […]

title: Firefly Alpha returns to flight
summary:
Firefly Aerospace’s Alpha rocket successfully returned to flight March 11, launching a technology demonstration mission more than 10 months after the rocket’s previous launch failed.

title: Dust Outbreak Reaches Europe
summary: Clouds of dust lofted from the Sahara Desert brought hazy skies and muddy rain to Western Europe.

title: Enpulsion raises $26 million
summary:
Enpulsion, an Austrian company that produces satellite electric propulsion systems, has raised its first significant outside funding to increase production and potentially acquire other companies.

title: Report criticizes delays in Artemis lunar lander development
summary:
NASA’s approach to managing the development of crewed lunar landers for Artemis has successfully controlled costs but not schedule, raising questions about NASA’s desire to accelerate those efforts.
